items.title: Fixture scopes — recreation frequency
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  S["session: 1 instance / pytest run"]
  M["module:  1 instance / file"]
  C["class:   1 instance / class"]
  F["function: 1 instance / test (default)"]
  S --> M --> C --> F
  style F fill:#dcfce7
  style S fill:#fee2e2
items.caption: Larger scope = fewer instantiations (faster) but more shared state (riskier). Default to function; widen deliberately.

items.title: Where to `patch` — at the use site
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR Lib["openai.OpenAI
(library)"] App["ragapp.summarizer
imports OpenAI"] Test["test_summarizer.py"] Lib -. defined in .-> App Test -- "patch('ragapp.summarizer.OpenAI')" --> App Test -. WRONG: patch('openai.OpenAI') .-x Lib
items.caption: Patch the name as the module-under-test sees it (`ragapp.summarizer.OpenAI`), not where it was defined.
